title: mentha × verticillata var. ovalifolia
intro: Mentha × verticillata var. ovalifolia, also known as oval-leaved mint or peppermint-leaved mint, is a hybrid mint plant that belongs to the Lamiaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to ease digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and act as an antiseptic. The health benefits of Mentha × verticillata var. ovalifolia include its potential to alleviate nausea, relieve headaches, and boost the immune system. The plant's leaves and essential oil can be used to make herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and topical creams, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
